subcodes.first_line: O Lord! This assemblage hath gathered in this meeting out of pure love and with utmost unity and accord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار این جمع محض محبت باین محفل آمدند و با کمال حب و وفاق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for detachment, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for gatherings; meetings; assemblies
